perks.summary: render a plot from a data file and save it in publication formats (PDF/PNG/EPS/SVG/TIFF) at correct DPI
render a plot and export it with a specific journal's required formats + DPI (nature/science/cell/plos/acs/ieee)
check whether a figure's width/height (inches) complies with a journal's column-width + max-height specs (read-only report)
emit a publication-quality matplotlib .mplstyle template (fonts, spines, ticks, Okabe-Ito color cycle, savefig DPI)
